privileged_info_summary: The Sock Shop microservices reference architecture contains 9 services (7 to be added: catalogue, carts, orders, payment, user, shipping, queue-master; plus 2 already present: edge-router, front-end), 4 databases (catalogue-db using MySQL, carts-db/orders-db/user-db using MongoDB), and 1 message queue (RabbitMQ). The architecture has 15 dependencies using three protocols: HTTP for service-to-service communication, TCP for service-to-database connections, and AMQP for message queue interactions. The task requires adding 14 total shapes (7 services + 4 databases + 1 queue) to an initial diagram that already contains edge-router and front-end components. Services are implemented in Go (catalogue, payment, user), Java (carts, orders, shipping, queue-master), Node.js (front-end), and Traefik (edge-router). This is a synthetic but accurate representation of the real Sock Shop microservices demo application created by Weaveworks.
